clinical_workflow.intended_use: Clinician-controlled documentation scaffold for mole mapping follow-up.
clinical_workflow.not_for: Not for autonomous diagnosis, treatment selection, dosing, disposition, admission/discharge, procedural, imaging, referral, or emergency management decisions.

source_phase1.reason_for_inclusion: Common Dermatology documentation scenario suitable as clinician-controlled note scaffolding rather than autonomous clinical advice.
source_phase1.distinct_purpose: Distinct follow-up workflow focused on interval change, clinician-documented review, and documented plan for mole mapping follow-up.
source_phase1.duplicate_check_notes: Cleaned Phase 1 candidate. Exact ID is unique within this revised index and must be checked against existing_workflow_ids.json and alias inventory before import; no close baseline workflow assigned in this cleaned index.

safety_notes: No autonomous diagnosis or treatment recommendation is intended.
Red flags are documentation prompts only.
red_flag_prompts: rapid spread, mucosal involvement, or systemic symptoms documented if assessed
secondary infection signs documented if assessed
severe pain or immunocompromise documented if relevant

workflow_identity.evidence_relationship: The exact melanoma assessment section supports recording specialist mole or pigmented-lesion review, dermoscopy, baseline photography and interval comparison without diagnosing melanoma or selecting excision.

The exact melanoma assessment section supports recording specialist mole or pigmented-lesion review, dermoscopy, baseline photography and interval comparison without diagnosing melanoma or selecting excision.

history_draft.text: Mole mapping follow-up. [Interval history]. [Current symptoms/concerns]. [Change since last review]. [Relevant negatives]. [Clinician-documented discussion]. [Additional history].

exam_prompts.text: Documented if assessed or measured. Skin inspection documented.
Documented if assessed or measured. Lesion/rash distribution documented.
Documented if assessed or measured. Mucosal/secondary infection check documented.
Documented if assessed or measured. General appearance documented.

investigation_options.text: Reviewed if relevant. Reviewed. Clinician-entered Clinical photographs reviewed.
Reviewed if relevant. Reviewed. Clinician-entered Previous dermatology records reviewed.
Reviewed if relevant. Reviewed. Clinician-entered Laboratory or pathology results reviewed.

plan_options.text: Safety-netting documented if discussed by clinician.
Follow-up documented if arranged by clinician.
Patient questions or counseling discussion documented if discussed.
plan_options.output_text: Patient questions or counseling discussion documented.

clinical_blockers: Exact lesion count and sites, lesion morphology, dermoscopic findings, risk history, prior melanoma, family history, sun exposure, skin type, diagnosis, biopsy or excision decision, pathology, referral, and surveillance interval remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
